fa-octagon.appearanceId: eight-sided polygon with equal sides and flat edges; regular octagon outline shape
fa-octagon.functionalityId: represents a stop or warning shape; marks a boundary or geometric placeholder
fa-octagon.intentId: indicate a stop sign or warning zone; use a geometric octagon shape as a design element

fa-octagon-check.appearanceId: eight-sided polygon with a checkmark overlaid at the center; octagon outline containing a tick mark glyph
fa-octagon-check.functionalityId: confirms or approves a selection within an octagonal badge; marks an item as verified inside a stop-sign shape
fa-octagon-check.intentId: indicate approval or successful completion within a badge; confirm a task or status with an octagonal check mark

fa-octagon-divide.appearanceId: eight-sided polygon with a horizontal division line and two dots overlaid at the center; octagon outline containing a divide or obelus symbol
fa-octagon-divide.functionalityId: represents a division operation or split within an octagonal badge; marks a mathematical divide symbol inside a stop-sign shape
fa-octagon-divide.intentId: indicate a division or split action within a badge; use as a mathematical or segmentation symbol in an octagonal context

fa-octagon-exclamation.appearanceId: eight-sided polygon with a bold exclamation mark overlaid at the center; octagon outline containing an alert punctuation glyph
fa-octagon-exclamation.functionalityId: signals a warning or alert within an octagonal badge; highlights an urgent notice inside a stop-sign shape
fa-octagon-exclamation.intentId: warn the user of a critical issue or hazard; draw attention to an urgent alert using an octagonal badge

fa-octagon-plus.appearanceId: eight-sided polygon with a plus sign overlaid at the center; octagon outline containing a cross or addition glyph
fa-octagon-plus.functionalityId: adds a new item or action within an octagonal badge; represents a create or expand function inside a stop-sign shape
fa-octagon-plus.intentId: add or create a new entry using an octagonal badge; indicate an additive action within a geometric badge shape

fa-octagon-xmark.appearanceId: eight-sided polygon with an X mark overlaid at the center; octagon outline containing a cross or close glyph
fa-octagon-xmark.functionalityId: cancels, closes, or removes an item within an octagonal badge; marks rejection or deletion inside a stop-sign shape
fa-octagon-xmark.intentId: reject, cancel, or close an action using an octagonal badge; indicate a forbidden or removed state with an X inside an octagon

fa-octopus.appearanceId: rounded bulbous head with eight tentacles or arms extending downward with sucker bumps; cartoon cephalopod body with curling limbs
fa-octopus.functionalityId: represents an octopus animal or sea creature; illustrates a multi-armed marine organism
fa-octopus.intentId: identify or categorize ocean wildlife content; use as a marine life or aquatic theme symbol

fa-oil-can.appearanceId: small handheld can body with a long narrow spout and a pump lever on top; lubrication can outline with a nozzle tip
fa-oil-can.functionalityId: represents oil or lubricant dispensing; indicates a maintenance or lubrication action
fa-oil-can.intentId: signal a need for lubrication or mechanical maintenance; access oil or fluid service settings

fa-oil-can-drip.appearanceId: small handheld can body with a long narrow spout and a drop of liquid falling from the nozzle tip; lubrication can outline with a dripping droplet
fa-oil-can-drip.functionalityId: represents active oil dripping or lubricant being dispensed; indicates fluid application during maintenance
fa-oil-can-drip.intentId: signal active lubrication or fluid dispensing in progress; indicate oil application during a service or repair task

fa-oil-temp.appearanceId: thermometer outline with an oil drop or flame shape at the base indicating temperature; temperature gauge combined with an oil or fluid symbol
fa-oil-temp.functionalityId: monitors or displays the oil temperature level; indicates engine or fluid heat status
fa-oil-temp.intentId: check or alert on oil temperature for engine health; monitor fluid temperature in a vehicle or mechanical system

fa-oil-well.appearanceId: derrick tower structure with cross-beam supports and a base platform; oil rig or pump jack silhouette outline
fa-oil-well.functionalityId: represents an oil extraction or drilling site; indicates petroleum production infrastructure
fa-oil-well.intentId: identify oil and gas extraction or energy resources; navigate to petroleum production or drilling content

fa-olive.appearanceId: small oval fruit shape with a tiny stem or leaf nub at the top; rounded drupe silhouette resembling a small berry or pit fruit
fa-olive.functionalityId: represents an olive fruit or food ingredient; identifies an olive in a culinary or botanical context
fa-olive.intentId: label or browse olive-related food or recipe content; identify an olive ingredient in a menu or ingredient list

fa-olive-branch.appearanceId: curved stem or twig with small oval leaves and round olive fruits along its length; botanical branch silhouette with berries and foliage
fa-olive-branch.functionalityId: symbolizes peace, reconciliation, or a diplomatic gesture; represents an olive branch as a botanical or peace emblem
fa-olive-branch.intentId: convey peace, harmony, or goodwill in a design; reference diplomacy or reconciliation in a symbolic context

fa-om.appearanceId: stylized Sanskrit Om or Aum character with curved lines, a hook, and a crescent and dot above; ornate Hindu sacred symbol glyph
fa-om.functionalityId: represents the Hindu sacred syllable Om or Aum; indicates a spiritual, meditative, or religious context
fa-om.intentId: identify Hindu or Buddhist religious content; use as a spiritual or meditation theme symbol

fa-omega.appearanceId: Greek capital letter omega with two curved legs and an open base; horseshoe-shaped character glyph with upward-curving ends
fa-omega.functionalityId: represents the Greek letter omega or the last in a sequence; indicates an electrical resistance unit or end-point symbol
fa-omega.intentId: label a physics or electrical resistance value; use as a Greek alphabet character or end-of-sequence marker

fa-onion.appearanceId: rounded bulb shape with layered curved lines and a short stem at the top; bulbous vegetable silhouette with concentric layer lines
fa-onion.functionalityId: represents an onion vegetable or food ingredient; identifies an onion in a culinary or grocery context
fa-onion.intentId: label or browse onion-related food or recipe content; identify an onion ingredient in a menu or shopping list

fa-option.appearanceId: keyboard key outline labeled with the word Option or the Mac option symbol (a horizontal line with a bent upward line); keycap shape with modifier key glyph
fa-option.functionalityId: represents the Option or Alt keyboard modifier key; indicates an alternate keyboard shortcut or input option
fa-option.intentId: reference a keyboard shortcut using the Option key; indicate alternate input or modifier key functionality

fa-ornament.appearanceId: round ball shape with a small cap and hanging loop at the top; spherical Christmas or holiday decoration bauble outline
fa-ornament.functionalityId: represents a holiday ornament or festive decoration; indicates a Christmas tree bauble or seasonal embellishment
fa-ornament.intentId: decorate or theme content for a holiday or Christmas season; identify ornament or seasonal decoration items

fa-otter.appearanceId: small furry animal silhouette with a rounded head, short limbs, and a long tapered tail; semi-aquatic mammal body outline
fa-otter.functionalityId: represents an otter animal or wildlife subject; illustrates a semi-aquatic mammal in a nature context
fa-otter.intentId: identify wildlife or nature content featuring otters; use as a playful or nature-themed mascot or symbol

fa-outlet.appearanceId: rectangular wall plate outline with two vertical slot openings and a round ground hole forming a face shape; electrical outlet faceplate with plug receptacle slots
fa-outlet.functionalityId: represents an electrical outlet or power socket; indicates a power source or plug-in connection point
fa-outlet.intentId: locate or label an electrical power outlet; indicate a device charging or power connection location

fa-oven.appearanceId: rectangular appliance outline with a large front window, control knobs or dials along the top, and a handle bar; kitchen oven silhouette with viewing door and controls
fa-oven.functionalityId: represents a kitchen oven or cooking appliance; indicates baking or roasting functionality in a culinary context
fa-oven.intentId: access cooking or baking settings for a smart oven; identify kitchen appliance controls in a home or recipe context

fa-overline.appearanceId: a horizontal line drawn above a row of text characters; overbar or vinculum stroke sitting on top of letter glyphs
fa-overline.functionalityId: applies an overline text decoration above characters; marks text with a horizontal bar above the baseline
fa-overline.intentId: format text with an overline or overbar decoration; indicate a mathematical vinculum or text markup style

fa-p.appearanceId: single uppercase or lowercase letter P glyph; Roman alphabet character with a vertical stem and a single right-side bowl
fa-p.functionalityId: represents the letter P as a typographic character; labels or abbreviates a word, name, or category starting with P
fa-p.intentId: use as a single-letter label, abbreviation, or keyboard shortcut; indicate a category or item beginning with the letter P

fa-page.appearanceId: rectangular document sheet outline with a folded upper-right corner; paper page silhouette with a dog-ear fold at the top corner
fa-page.functionalityId: represents a document page or file sheet; indicates a page of content in a document or report
fa-page.intentId: navigate to or open a document page; represent a page of content in a file or publication

fa-page-break.appearanceId: two stacked page outlines separated by a dashed horizontal dividing line; document sheet pair with a break line between them
fa-page-break.functionalityId: inserts or indicates a page break in a document; marks the division point between two pages in a layout
fa-page-break.intentId: add a page break to a document for print or layout formatting; navigate to the boundary between two pages in a publication

fa-pager.appearanceId: small rectangular handheld device outline with a display screen and a row of buttons; beeper or paging device silhouette with a screen and controls
fa-pager.functionalityId: represents a pager or beeper communication device; indicates a one-way wireless messaging gadget
fa-pager.intentId: indicate on-call or emergency paging communication; reference a legacy wireless messaging device in a healthcare or service context

fa-paint-roller.appearanceId: cylindrical roller head mounted on an L-shaped handle frame; paint roller tool outline with a textured drum and an angled grip
fa-paint-roller.functionalityId: represents a paint roller tool for applying paint to surfaces; indicates a wall painting or coating action
fa-paint-roller.intentId: apply paint or color to a large surface area; indicate a painting or decorating task in a home or design context

fa-paintbrush.appearanceId: long straight handle with a tapered ferrule and a pointed bristle tip at one end; standard artist paintbrush silhouette with a narrow tip
fa-paintbrush.functionalityId: represents a paintbrush tool for painting or drawing; indicates a freehand brush stroke or artistic editing action
fa-paintbrush.intentId: select a brush tool for painting or artistic creation; indicate a drawing or illustration mode in a creative application

fa-paintbrush-alt.appearanceId: angled or fan-shaped bristle head on a short tapered handle; flat or angled artist brush silhouette with a wider bristle spread
fa-paintbrush-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternate style of paintbrush for broad strokes; indicates an angled or flat brush tool for painting
fa-paintbrush-alt.intentId: select an alternate brush style for painting or design; use a flat or angled brush for broader artistic strokes

fa-paintbrush-pencil.appearanceId: dual-ended tool with a pointed bristle tip on one end and a pencil or eraser tip on the other; combination brush-and-pencil instrument outline
fa-paintbrush-pencil.functionalityId: represents a combined paintbrush and pencil tool; indicates a multi-mode drawing and painting instrument
fa-paintbrush-pencil.intentId: switch between brush and pencil modes in a creative tool; use a combined drawing and painting instrument in a design application

fa-palette.appearanceId: oval thumbhole palette board with several small circular paint blobs arranged around the edge; artist mixing palette silhouette with a thumb cutout and color dots
fa-palette.functionalityId: represents an artist's color palette for mixing paints; indicates a color selection or theme customization tool
fa-palette.intentId: choose or customize a color scheme in a design application; indicate artistic or creative color mixing functionality

fa-pallet.appearanceId: flat wooden shipping pallet with horizontal deck boards and visible support blocks or stringers underneath; warehouse pallet silhouette with parallel slat lines
fa-pallet.functionalityId: represents a shipping or storage pallet for moving goods; indicates warehouse, logistics, or freight handling
fa-pallet.intentId: manage or track warehouse inventory or shipping pallets; indicate freight or logistics operations in a supply chain context

fa-pallet-alt.appearanceId: flat wooden shipping pallet outline in an alternate or stylized perspective showing deck boards and support rails; warehouse pallet silhouette with a different angle or design variant
fa-pallet-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternate view or style of a shipping pallet; indicates warehouse storage or freight handling in a variant format
fa-pallet-alt.intentId: manage or display an alternate pallet format in a logistics or inventory system; use a variant pallet symbol in supply chain design

fa-pallet-box.appearanceId: flat wooden pallet base with a rectangular box or crate stacked on top; shipping pallet silhouette with a container or crate overlaid above
fa-pallet-box.functionalityId: represents a boxed shipment loaded on a pallet; indicates a packaged freight unit ready for warehousing or transport
fa-pallet-box.intentId: track or manage a palletized shipment with a stacked box; indicate packaged freight in a warehouse or logistics workflow

fa-pan-food.appearanceId: wide shallow circular pan or dish outline with a long straight handle; flat cooking pan silhouette viewed from above or at an angle
fa-pan-food.functionalityId: represents a cooking pan or skillet for preparing food; indicates a stovetop cooking or frying action
fa-pan-food.intentId: select or manage a cooking pan in a recipe or kitchen context; indicate food preparation on a stovetop

fa-pan-frying.appearanceId: wide shallow frying pan outline with a long handle and wavy steam lines or food contents visible inside; skillet silhouette with heat or cooking activity indicated
fa-pan-frying.functionalityId: represents active frying or sauteing food in a pan; indicates stovetop cooking with heat applied to a skillet
fa-pan-frying.intentId: indicate an active frying or cooking process on a stovetop; access frying-related recipes or cooking instructions

fa-pancakes.appearanceId: stack of multiple flat circular disc shapes layered on top of each other; tiered stack of round flat cakes or discs
fa-pancakes.functionalityId: represents a stack of pancakes as a food item; indicates a breakfast dish or stacked flat cake food
fa-pancakes.intentId: browse or label breakfast food content featuring pancakes; identify a pancake dish in a menu or recipe application

fa-panel-ews.appearanceId: rectangular panel outline divided into sections with small indicator lights or status blocks arranged in a grid or row; control panel faceplate with multiple status indicators
fa-panel-ews.functionalityId: represents an early warning system or status monitoring panel; displays system health or alert indicators on a dashboard panel
fa-panel-ews.intentId: monitor system alerts or early warning indicators on a control panel; access a status or alarm monitoring dashboard

fa-panel-fire.appearanceId: rectangular panel outline with a flame or fire symbol displayed on its face; control or display panel silhouette featuring a fire hazard indicator
fa-panel-fire.functionalityId: represents a fire alarm or fire detection panel; indicates a fire safety monitoring or alerting system
fa-panel-fire.intentId: monitor or access a fire alarm or fire detection control panel; indicate fire safety system status in a building or facility

fa-panorama.appearanceId: wide rectangular image frame with a curved or landscape scene silhouette inside; wide-angle photo frame outline with a broad horizontal aspect ratio
fa-panorama.functionalityId: represents a panoramic wide-angle photo or view; indicates a 360-degree or wide-format image display
fa-panorama.intentId: capture or view a wide-angle panoramic photograph; browse or display a broad landscape or immersive photo format

fa-paper-plane.appearanceId: folded paper airplane shape with angular wings and a pointed nose; origami-style aircraft silhouette formed from a flat sheet
fa-paper-plane.functionalityId: sends a message or submits content; represents a send or transmit action
fa-paper-plane.intentId: send a message or submit a form to a recipient; indicate a dispatch or outbox action in a messaging interface

fa-paperclip.appearanceId: elongated oval loop with a parallel inner loop forming a wire paperclip shape; fastening clip outline with a double-loop wire form
fa-paperclip.functionalityId: attaches a file or document to a message or record; indicates an attachment or linked file
fa-paperclip.intentId: attach a file or document to an email or message; indicate a file attachment in a communication or document interface

fa-paperclip-vertical.appearanceId: elongated vertical oval loop with a parallel inner loop forming a wire paperclip oriented in portrait alignment; upright double-loop wire fastener shape
fa-paperclip-vertical.functionalityId: attaches a file or document in a vertically oriented layout; indicates an attachment in a vertical or portrait arrangement
fa-paperclip-vertical.intentId: attach a file or document in a vertically oriented interface; indicate a portrait-mode or vertically arranged attachment action

fa-parachute-box.appearanceId: open parachute canopy with suspension lines hanging down to a rectangular box or crate below; supply drop silhouette with a box package suspended from a chute
fa-parachute-box.functionalityId: represents an airdrop, supply delivery, or humanitarian aid package; indicates a package being delivered via parachute
fa-parachute-box.intentId: indicate a supply drop or airdrop delivery of goods; represent humanitarian aid, relief supply, or aerial cargo delivery

fa-paragraph.appearanceId: pilcrow or paragraph mark glyph with a reversed P shape and a double vertical stem; typographic paragraph symbol with a filled bowl and dual downstrokes
fa-paragraph.functionalityId: inserts or marks a paragraph break in a text document; indicates a paragraph formatting symbol in a text editor
fa-paragraph.intentId: format or navigate paragraph breaks in a document; indicate a paragraph style or text structure in a word processing context

fa-paragraph-rtl.appearanceId: mirrored pilcrow or reversed paragraph mark glyph with the bowl facing right and dual vertical stems; right-to-left typography paragraph symbol
fa-paragraph-rtl.functionalityId: inserts or marks a paragraph break for right-to-left text direction; indicates RTL paragraph formatting in a text editor
fa-paragraph-rtl.intentId: format or navigate paragraph breaks in a right-to-left language document; indicate RTL text structure or paragraph style for Arabic, Hebrew, or similar scripts

fa-parentheses.appearanceId: matched pair of curved bracket glyphs facing each other with a space between; opening and closing parenthesis character pair ( )
fa-parentheses.functionalityId: represents a pair of parentheses as a typographic or code element; inserts or indicates grouped or enclosed text content
fa-parentheses.intentId: insert or indicate parenthetical grouping in text or code; use as a mathematical or programming grouping symbol

fa-parenthesis.appearanceId: single curved bracket glyph as a standalone character; one half of a parenthesis pair, either opening or closing curved bracket
fa-parenthesis.functionalityId: represents a single parenthesis character as a typographic element; inserts or indicates one side of an enclosing bracket
fa-parenthesis.intentId: insert a single parenthesis character in text or code; indicate one bracket of a grouping or enclosing pair in a formula or expression
